notes: Wizard step 3 unstuck + main-UI volume drag calmed. Step 3 was stuck because v1.0.40's setupComplete gate blocked ALL knob rotation, but the client still watched d.vol which therefore never changed. Fix: new firmware flag wizardVolumeTest that permits VOLUME-mode rotation ONLY when the wizard client asks for it via /api/wizard/voltest?on=1 on step-3 entry. Bass/Treble/clicks stay blocked. Step 3 now sees the paired Sonos actually respond as proof of pairing. Speaker list improvements finally shipped: names only, tap-or-click any row to select, scrollIntoView follows the knob highlight. /api/wizard/reset now also clears speakers[] and paired-speaker NVS. Main-UI volume gauge: drag ratio slowed 3x and touch drag needs a 250ms hold to arm — quick finger-swipe scrolls the page, deliberate press-and-drag adjusts volume.
